RURIMEGU-ENTRANCE_EXAM.title: Entrance Exam
RURIMEGU-ENTRANCE_EXAM.description: At the start of each combat, [gold]Burst[/gold] {RURIMEGU-BURST:diff()}.
RURIMEGU-ENTRANCE_EXAM.flavor: Finally, I have become a first-year student of Hasunosora Girls' High!
RURIMEGU-LIVE_SYNC_CHRONOMETER.title: Live-Sync Chronometer
RURIMEGU-LIVE_SYNC_CHRONOMETER.descripti: During your turn, trigger [gold]Auto Burst[/gold] once per real-time minute.
RURIMEGU-LIVE_SYNC_CHRONOMETER.flavor: Transcend the limited time and bloom with all your might.
RURIMEGU-TALE_OF_PETER_RABBIT.title: The Tale of Peter Rabbit
RURIMEGU-TALE_OF_PETER_RABBIT.descriptio: If your [gold]❤️[/gold] have not reached half the max ❤️ at the end of your turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
RURIMEGU-TALE_OF_PETER_RABBIT.flavor: Once upon a time, there were four little rabbits……
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_EARS.title: Bunny Ears
RURIMEGU-BUNNY_EARS.description: For every [blue]10[/blue] [gold]❤️[/gold] overflowed, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
RURIMEGU-SHOPPING_MALL.title: Shopping Mall
RURIMEGU-SHOPPING_MALL.description: All enemies drop an extra card reward. At the end of each combat, lose {Gold:inverseDiff()} Gold.
RURIMEGU-SHOPPING_MALL.flavor: Wow, they actually built such a huge shopping mall!
RURIMEGU-CAP_LIBERATOR.title: Cap Liberator
RURIMEGU-CAP_LIBERATOR.description: Upon pickup, remove every pair of identical [gold]Unupgraded[/gold] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. For each removed pair, add one [gold]Upgraded[/gold] copy to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
RURIMEGU-CAP_LIBERATOR.flavor: So, what's the plan? What kind of dream do you want to keep dreaming here?
RURIMEGU-LINKURA_SYSTEM.title: Linkura System
RURIMEGU-LINKURA_SYSTEM.description: At the start of each combat, gain {RURIMEGU-AUTO_BURST:diff()} [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
RURIMEGU-LINKURA_SYSTEM.flavor: A system that allows all school idols to bloom!
RURIMEGU-DREAM_DEFINE.title: DREAM_Define
RURIMEGU-DREAM_DEFINE.description: At the start of each combat, gain {RURIMEGU-AUTO_BURST:diff()} [gold]Auto Burst[/gold].
RURIMEGU-DREAM_DEFINE.flavor:
Welcome, visitor.
Have a pleasant journey to Elysion.
